name: Levelset Construction Payment API
what_it_does: Levelset REST API for construction payment compliance and lien management platform. Enables AI agents to send preliminary notices, track lien waivers, manage payment compliance documents, monitor payment status, and integrate construction payment workflow into project management systems. Levelset (a Procore company) helps contractors and subcontractors protect payment rights under construction lien law.
use_cases: Sending preliminary notices and lien waivers from construction payment agents
Tracking payment compliance status across projects from compliance automation agents
Managing lien waiver exchanges from subcontractor payment agents
Integrating payment compliance data with project management systems from construction agents
not_for: General accounts payable without construction lien law requirements
Non-construction industries without mechanics lien processes
Consumer transactions without commercial construction context
best_when: A general contractor, subcontractor, or material supplier wants AI agents to automate preliminary notice delivery, lien waiver management, and payment compliance tracking across construction projects.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Lien law compliance errors can result in loss of lien rights and payment claims. State-by-state lien law variations require accurate jurisdiction handling. Legal review recommended.

auth.notes: Levelset uses OAuth 2.0 for API authentication. Acquired by Procore in 2021 — authentication may align with Procore's auth model. API access requires Levelset account and developer approval.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free preliminary notice sending; paid plans for advanced compliance features
pricing.paid_tiers: Pro and Enterprise plans with more documents, projects, and users
pricing.notes: Procore-owned since 2021. Lien rights protection SaaS. Per-project or per-seat pricing for paid features.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth app; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Lien law compliance errors can result in loss of payment rights — legal review critical
No public MCP server — REST API requiring developer access request
State-by-state lien law variations — deadline and notice requirements differ by jurisdiction
Procore acquisition in 2021 — integration with Procore platform may affect API patterns
Legal documents generated via API have real legal standing — accuracy is critical
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Lien rights and payment compliance with legal standing. SOC2. US-only. Legal document generation requires high accuracy.

security_score_components.security_notes: Payment compliance and legal documents. SOC2. US-only. Legal standing documents require high accuracy.
